text_block_list.text: Cicadas buzz through the damp and hot air.

text_block_list.name: TV Announcer
text_block_list.text:
With the last of the spring G1s over, could you
share your thoughts on the spring season as a
whole?

text_block_list.name: TV Commentary
text_block_list.text:
We've got some young racers gaining momentum,
like T.M. Opera O and Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: TV Commentary
text_block_list.text:
However, it's still to be determined whether
they're in the same league as the "Ultimate
Generation."

text_block_list.name: TV Commentary
text_block_list.text:
The older generation brings both strategy and
tenacity to the track—we'll have to simply wait
and see if the rising generation stands a real
chance.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp, summer camp! ♪ I'm just one step
away from shining bright just like Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: If I give it my best during camp this year, I'll return home shining bright and capable of beating the previous generation, right, Trainer?

My eyes fixated on the latest training report, I
give her a lackluster response.

Her rate of improvement has slowed compared to
the growth spurt she experienced last year. It
could be natural, but...

What if she's reached her peak? What if she
remains a step behind T.M. Opera O?

Last year, Meisho Doto managed to break past
her previous stat ceiling.

Towards the end of the Classics, and after
discovering Admire Vega's injury, she pushed past
her emotional wall and began showing real
improvement.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm going to give it my all. So, watch me, Trainer!

I want to hold out in hopes that things will be
fine. I have to do my best to see her achieve
another breakthrough.
